subject: 📊 Daily Portfolio: +3.95% | VRDN ✅ FDA Approved (missed) + VERA PDUFA in 7 days
html_body:
Daily Portfolio Check

Monday, June 30, 2026 — Kuwait Time (AST)

Total P&L (positions)

+$17.82 (+3.95%)

Today

+$2.90 (+0.62%)

🎯 Withdrawal goal: $821.77 / $1,000 — $178.23 to go (82.2% there)

VRDN watchlist got FDA approved today — entry missed due to IBKR blocker. VERA PDUFA July 7 in 7 days.

⚠️ Decision needed by Thursday July 3

VERA PDUFA July 7 — trim now? Math: (43.18−42)×6 = +$7.08 gross, −$3 commission = +$4.08 net. Not worth splitting a binary play for $4. Recommendation: HOLD all 6 shares. 89% approval probability. Confirm Thursday before the holiday weekend.

Position Snapshot

StatusTickerCloseDayP&L $P&L %
⚠️ WATCHVERA$43.18−2.66%+$7.08+2.81%
✅ HOLDANET$165.46+4.99%+$10.74+5.39%
TOTAL—+0.62%+$17.82+3.95%

Prices June 30 2026. VERA: Yahoo Finance/CNBC/Nasdaq (~$43.18). ANET: Investing.com/TradingView (~$165.46). Account total (positions + $352.56 cash): $821.77.

Position Detail

VERA Vera Therapeutics — IgAN ⚠️ WATCH$43.18 −2.66%

6 shares x $42.00. PDUFA July 7 — 7 days. 🔴 URGENT binary. Atacicept for IgAN: 89% approval probability, NEJM Phase 3 proteinuria −46% vs placebo, 14 analysts Strong Buy avg $78. On CRL: expect gap to $10–15. Today's pullback (−2.66%) is normal pre-event noise.

No trim: gross P&L all shares = +$7.08. Net after $3 exit commission = +$4.08. Not worth splitting for $4.

Stop: $24.50 — CRL gap zone (intentionally wide for binary hold; technical pre-PDUFA base ~$41)
TP1: $55.00 — post-approval stabilization; sell 3 shares | Gross +$39 | Net +$36 ✅
TP2: $78.00 — analyst consensus midpoint ($68–$83); sell remaining 3 | Gross +$108 | Net +$105 ✅
ANET Arista Networks — AI Networking ✅ HOLD$165.46 +4.99%

1.27 shares x $157.00. Up 5.4% from entry. Q2 guided $2.8B (+35% YoY). Strong Buy consensus (29 analysts). 1.6-terabit AI platform intact. Exit plan: TP1 $185 by July 25 at latest (Q2 earnings ~Aug 5 is outside your window).

Stop: $144.00 (below $146.94 swing support — confirmed)TP1: $185.00 (resistance $180–$190 | exit full | Net +$32.56 ✅)Consensus: $190.09

⏳ Pending Watchlist

VRDN Viridian Therapeutics — TED ⚫ EVENT PASSED🔒 IBKR BLOCKER

FDA ✅ APPROVED Lumvoa (veligrotug) today — first all-stage thyroid eye disease therapy. Stock +7.6–12% on news. Your $20 entry target was valid (pre-approval price $17.90 = 10.5% below target). UBS reiterates Buy with $50 price target.

IBKR blocker cost a clean binary win. This is the 2nd IBKR miss (1st: original VERA $34 entry). Escalate broker approval urgently.

Action: Archive this watchlist entry. Entry window closed post-approval re-pricing.

CAPR Capricor Therapeutics — DMD WATCH 6/10

Live: $24.84 (−5.91% today) vs $26 target — 4.6% below target, entry still valid. 🟡 AdCom July 29 — 29 days. PDUFA Aug 22. Deramiocel for DMD cardiomyopathy. Phase 3 HOPE-3: primary endpoint PUL v2.0 + cardiac LVEF — both hit. Market cap $1.44B.

⚠️ Bearish signal: Unusual put activity today — 5:1 puts over calls. 2,900-contract block on Aug 21 $20 put at $5.50. Institutional bet on stock at/below $20 post-AdCom. Investigate before entry.

Stop: $18.00 | TP1: $52.00 | Halal: ⚠️ Unverified

Per plan: decide ONLY after VERA July 7. Bearish put block needs explaining before entry.

📡 Catalyst Plays — June 30, 2026

REPL — Replimune Group

RP1 for Advanced Melanoma — BLA resubmission | PDUFA Aug 2 + AdCom late July — 33 days 🟡 SOON

Market cap ~$350M | Cash: $269M | Short interest: unknown

Probability: ~55% — prior CRL was manufacturing/data-gap (not safety). FDA resubmission accepted after productive discussion. AdCom required = FDA wants external input (slight negative signal on base rate). CRL-reversal base rate ~60–70%.

✅ Positive: ~$12–18 (+140–260%) — CRL reversal re-rating to prior ATH zone

💀 Negative: ~$1–2 (−60–80%) — existential risk flagged in 10-K

Smart money: 5,000-contract Aug $15 call block at $1.65 — fresh bullish positioning. Significant at this market cap.

Halal: ⚠️ Unverified | Cash runway to 2028, no dilution risk near-term.

WATCH — 3/5

At current account size max position ~$75 (existential downside). Say 'analyze REPL' before entry.

CAPR — Capricor Therapeutics

Deramiocel for DMD — AdCom July 29 + PDUFA Aug 22 — 29 days 🟡 SOON

Market cap: $1.44B | Price $24.84 (−5.91%) | Entry target $26

Probability: ~65% AdCom positive — Phase 3 HOPE-3 hit primary + cardiac LVEF. Prior CRL from HOPE-2 alone; HOPE-3 addresses that gap. Orphan indication, no approved cardiac therapy for DMD.

✅ AdCom positive: ~$40–55 (+60–120%) | $150 position net gain: +$87–$132

💀 AdCom negative: ~$12–16 (−35–50%) | $150 position net loss: ~−$60–$80

⚠️ Smart money BEARISH today: 5:1 put/call, 2,900-contract Aug $20 put block. Must investigate.

WATCH — 2/5 (bearish options drag)

Watchlist entry. Decide post-VERA. Say 'analyze CAPR' for full deep dive.

AMLX — Amylyx Pharmaceuticals

Avexitide (GLP-1 antagonist) for post-bariatric hypoglycemia — Phase 3 LUCIDITY topline Q3 2026

78 patients enrolled. Cash runway to 2028. Strong Phase 2 history. Date uncertain (July or Aug or Sept).

SKIP — 1/5 (Gate 1 fails: no confirmed date ≤45 days)

Re-evaluate in July once exact data date confirmed. Bookmark.

💵 Cash Deployment — $352.56 available

Reserve: $3 | Buy commission: $3 | Net deployable: $346.56 | 30% portfolio cap per new position: $246.53

Recommendation: HOLD — deploy post-VERA July 7

Stacking VERA + CAPR or REPL simultaneously with an $821 account is too much binary concentration. Wait for July 7.
If VERA approved: Account ~$700–$1,000+. Evaluate CAPR for $150 position (AdCom July 29).
If VERA rejected: Hold cash. Reassess. CAPR becomes primary recovery binary IF thesis still clean.

🔍 Intelligence Layer

Risk Scores

VERA  | 64/100 | HIGH     | Pre-revenue binary; 55.8% concentration; PDUFA in 7 days
ANET  | 34/100 | MODERATE | PE 54x offset by 35% YoY growth + strong FCF

Key Signals

VRDN approved: IBKR blocker cost +7.6–12% — 2nd IBKR miss total. Escalate now.
CAPR puts: 5:1 put/call, large block on Aug $20 put — bearish. Investigate before entry.
REPL calls: 5,000-contract Aug $15 call block — institutional bullish pre-AdCom. Monitor.
ANET: +5.4% from entry in one session. Let it run to $185, no action now.

What to do tomorrow — July 1

No position changes. Watch VERA options flow: call volume spike pre-July 7 = bullish signal; put volume spike = smart money hedging. ANET: first checkpoint at $175. By Thursday July 3: confirm VERA hold decision before holiday weekend. Check IBKR application status — 2 missed entries make the timeline urgent.

📚 Today you learned — Concept #12

The DRAM/NAND Cycle

Memory chips — DRAM (fast, volatile) and NAND (slow, persistent storage) — are the most cyclical part of tech. Both are pure commodities: same spec across Samsung, Micron, SK Hynix, so pricing is set by global supply vs. demand and swings violently. The cycle: demand picks up → fabs run 100% utilization → 18 months later new capacity comes online → prices crash → consolidation → repeat. Right now we’re in an AI-driven HBM up-cycle. This matters for your ANET position: every GPU cluster in the data centers that ANET’s switches serve needs HBM (high-bandwidth memory) stacked vertically on the chip die. More hyperscaler AI capex = more ANET networking orders AND more HBM demand — same wave, parallel beneficiaries. The early warning signal on cycle turn: spot DRAM prices reversing >10% week-on-week. That’s when the AI build-out is stalling.

Also today: HBM (high-bandwidth memory) — specialized DRAM stacked vertically inside GPU packages; 3–5x higher margin than standard DRAM. Micron HBM allocation sold out through end of 2026.

Research output, not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Verify halal compliance quarterly on Zoya or Musaffa. Prices: VERA ~$43.18 (Yahoo Finance/CNBC/Nasdaq, June 30 2026), ANET ~$165.46 (Investing.com/TradingView, June 30 2026). VRDN approval: Benzinga/GuruFocus/SimplyWallSt June 30 2026. Commission: $3 exit per trade (entry sunk). Generated June 30, 2026 — Kuwait time (AST, UTC+3).
